text:
is a video game first released on 21 December 2006 for the PlayStation 2. It is based around the events of TV series and the film The End of Evangelion. It follows the original character Kyoya Kenzaki discovering secrets of the Human Instrumentality Project and other events regarding Evangelion Unit-04. Depending on the the choices made, there are 10 different endings.

Trivia

New event CG and quiz games were added to the PSP version and Windows version. 
In addition to the regular version, a limited edition was also released, and the PSP version included a PSP case and LCD protective sheet. 
The Windows version included a mouse pad and a 5-disc postcard.
